location_privacy_note: Public map coordinates are intentionally generalized or omitted. Map points should not be treated as exact node locations.
data_note: This file separates project infrastructure, observed MeshCore traffic, and field-tested coverage. Observed activity is not the same thing as guaranteed coverage.

infrastructure.label: Project Infrastructure
infrastructure.description: Nodes and systems intentionally documented by Hampden County Mesh.

observed_traffic.label: Observed MeshCore Traffic
observed_traffic.description: MeshCore activity seen through logs, observers, MQTT, analyzer data, or community reports.

coverage_tests.label: Field-Tested Coverage
coverage_tests.description: Areas where operators have intentionally tested send, receive, or routing behavior.

infrastructure.name: Hampden Room Observer
infrastructure.notes: Indoor observer connected through the MeshCore hub infrastructure. Used for logging, MQTT testing, and future status reporting. Exact public location is not published.

infrastructure.name: HampdenCountyTreeNode
infrastructure.notes: Outdoor solar repeater mounted approximately 20 to 30 feet up in a tree. Exact public location is not published.

infrastructure.name: Cassiopeia
infrastructure.notes: Portable companion node and owner device for observer configuration. Not shown on the public coverage map because it is mobile.
